title: Gui Essentials
description: It's a simple mod that adds your position and fps to your screen without the need to deal with the f3 menu.
body:
It's a simple mod that adds your position and fps to your screen without the need to deal with the f3 menu.

It is toggleable so you can hide and show whenever you want.

Please if you have any request for me too add to this mod feel free to comment!
